title: Sync stays connected — no more reconnect storms on busy workspaces
summary: The app no longer re-sends its whole change history to the hub on every load; sync now resumes from where it left off and throttles bursts, so the connection stays steady instead of tripping the hub's rate limit.
highlights: Reload resumes sync from a persisted cursor instead of replaying the entire change log
Outbound changes are throttled and a rate-limit disconnect backs off instead of reconnect-storming
A single malformed change no longer aborts a whole sync batch
